turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thanks for calling support, this is Derek. How can I help?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Hi, I placed an order three weeks ago and it still hasn't arrived. I was told it would be here in three to five days.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Let me check on that for you. Can I get your order number please?

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: It's order number 88421. Please hurry, I need this urgently.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Thank you, one moment while I look into that for you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Yes, sorry for the wait. So I can see your order has been delayed due to a warehouse processing issue. It looks like it should ship within the next five to seven business days.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: Five to seven MORE days?! This is completely unacceptable. I needed this last week. I want a refund and I want to know who your manager is right now.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I understand this is frustrating. Our warehouse team is working through a backlog at the moment.

turns.speaker: customer
turns.text: No, you clearly do not understand at all. I have been waiting three weeks for something that was supposed to take five days. I want to speak to a manager immediately and I am going to file a lawsuit against your company if this shipment does not arrive by end of week. I will also be disputing this charge with my bank and leaving reviews everywhere I can find. This is the most incompetent customer service I have ever dealt with in my entire life.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: I can transfer you to a supervisor right now. Please hold.
